title: streptopus ajanensis f. atrocarpus
intro: Streptopus ajanensis f. atrocarpus, also known as Black twisted twinflower, is a plant species in the family Liliaceae. It is primarily used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune system function. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Streptopus ajanensis f. atrocarpus are typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
